WELCOME TO J.R. CRICKETS
The Atlanta Buffalo Wing Tradition
The Original J.R. Crickets®
opened February 1982 on Spring St in Midtown Atlanta Georgia.
Over 30 years and 60 million wings later…
The Original J.R. Crickets
is still slingin’ wings
in Midtown Atlanta! In December of 2103 a fire moved us to our current location on North Avenue, just
three blocks from our previous home. Since then we’ve only gotten bigger and better than ever. You know
all about our wings, but don’t forget about our authentic steak & cheese philly, tender bbq pork ribs,
juicy burgers and suculent seafood.
A lively bar and inviting outdoor patio make
The Original J.R. Crickets®
your first choice for great
food and fun and always at a great price!
Original Buffalo Wings Sauce, Buffalo BBQ and Southern Sweet Style BBQ Sauces including our Lemony
Pepper Seasoning are available at your neighborhood
J.R. Crickets®
location.
J.R. Crickets Enterprises, Inc. handles our License Program that allows you to open you own and operate
a
J.R. Crickets®
restaurant.
So check us out just like your parents did when they were cool.
Paul M. Juliano
Founder and President
Crickets Fan Club
The Original JR Crickets
